problem_solved: Nursing homes and post-acute facilities face chronic staffing shortages leading to burnout and quality issues
solution_description: Platform matching nursing professionals with per diem, local contract, and travel assignments at healthcare facilities. Uses technology to optimize scheduling and matching. Provides employer-sponsored benefits and career development for nursing workforce
traction_signals: Ranked #1 for quality by nursing professionals
Per diem, local contracts, and travel assignments
notes: Nurse staffing platform, not SDOH-focused. Addresses healthcare workforce challenge which is related to care access. Low Varden fit - staffing marketplace vs. SDOH infrastructure. Important for care delivery but not core SDOH
